audit_items.proof_trace: The retentionEpochs field is initialized to MinEpochsForBlobsSidecarsRequest (4096 epochs) which matches MinEpochsForDataColumnSidecarsRequest. The prune function enforces retention by only pruning epochs where highestStoredEpoch - retentionEpochs >= sidecar_epoch, satisfying the >= MIN_EPOCHS requirement.
